issues_found: Summary correctly notes '8-month lag' which is accurate for June 2025 data released February 2026
Record appropriately describes this as 'lagging reference data release' in summary and notes
Data is preliminary; source explicitly states final figures due April 30, 2026 with possible revisions
The percentage calculations in key_points are accurate: 14.4% total increase, 17.6% equity increase, 9.1% long-term debt increase, 25.7% short-term debt increase
All important_numbers values match source data correctly
Top holders list (UK, Cayman, Canada, Japan) matches Table B in source
human_review_reason: Record is accurate and well-structured. Minor note: the 8-month data lag is correctly identified, and the 'data_release_other' event_type is appropriate. The record appropriately describes this as reference data rather than a market catalyst. The quality_tier classification as 'Tier 3 - Reference Data' is appropriate given the lag and preliminary nature. No fact-check corrections needed.
